# Build & Ship Pipeline

> LangGraph multi-agent pipeline with FastAPI backend and React frontend.
> 12 LLM agents collaborate to plan, code, test, and review features under a hard budget.

## Agent context

- agents/README.md: Universal entry point for AI coding tools
- agents/invariants.md: 5 critical LangGraph invariants that must never be violated
- agents/architecture.md: Pipeline topology, state schema, graph wiring, agent list
- agents/coding-standards.md: Python and TypeScript coding conventions
- agents/security.md: 8 authentication and security invariants
- agents/common-tasks.md: Quick commands for tests, build, seed, dev server
- agents/skills/: 20 YAML skill definitions seeded to DB as system defaults

## Project reference

- build-ship-pipeline/CLAUDE.md: Full AI agent knowledge base (authoritative)
- build-ship-pipeline/src/state.py: PipelineState TypedDict and _ALL_AGENTS list
- build-ship-pipeline/src/graph.py: LangGraph StateGraph wiring
- build-ship-pipeline/src/governance/governed.py: governed() decorator
- build-ship-pipeline/src/db/schema.sql: 12-table Postgres schema
- build-ship-pipeline/config/budget.yaml: Hard cost/token/step ceilings
- build-ship-pipeline/config/prices.yaml: USD/1K token prices and default models

## Source layout

- build-ship-pipeline/src/: Pipeline core (LangGraph, agents, governance, DB, RAG)
- build-ship-pipeline/ui/backend/: FastAPI REST + WebSocket API
- build-ship-pipeline/ui/frontend/src/: React + Vite + Tailwind frontend
- build-ship-pipeline/tests/unit/: Unit tests (16 tests, no live services required)
